name: Pipe of Insight
description: A powerful artifact of mysterious origin, it creates barriers against magical forces.

abilities.name: Barrier
abilities.description: Grants nearby allied units and buildings a magical damage barrier for a while. Cooldown: 60. Mana Cost: 150. Radius: 1200. Duration: 8. Stack Limit Duration: 59.

abilities.name: Insight Aura
abilities.description: Increases the health regeneration and magic resistance of nearby allies. Radius: 1200. Magic Resistance Bonus: 8%. Aura Linger Duration: 0.5.
